/home/runner/work/hydrological-endurance-monitor/hydrological-endurance-monitor/scripts/fetch_data.py:5: DeprecationWarning: datetime.datetime.utcnow() is deprecated and scheduled for removal in a future version. Use timezone-aware objects to represent datetimes in UTC: datetime.datetime.now(datetime.UTC).
  END   = datetime.utcnow().strftime('%Y-%m-%d')
/home/runner/work/hydrological-endurance-monitor/hydrological-endurance-monitor/scripts/fetch_data.py:6: DeprecationWarning: datetime.datetime.utcnow() is deprecated and scheduled for removal in a future version. Use timezone-aware objects to represent datetimes in UTC: datetime.datetime.now(datetime.UTC).
  START = (datetime.utcnow() - timedelta(days=400)).strftime('%Y-%m-%d')

[notice] To update, run: pip install --upgrade pip
